title: StudioDash
seoTitle: StudioDash | Developer Analytics Dashboard | BarkinMad Studios
description: StudioDash is a developer analytics platform from BarkinMad Studios, bringing together App Store Connect, Cloudflare, advertising and operational metrics into a single workspace.
keywords: developer dashboard, app analytics, app store analytics, cloudflare analytics, indie developer tools, studio dashboard, business intelligence
heading: StudioDash

hero.alt: StudioDash developer analytics dashboard with revenue, download, traffic and operational metrics

overview: StudioDash is an analytics and business intelligence platform being developed by BarkinMad Studios for independent developers, creators, and small studios.

It brings together App Store Connect, Cloudflare, AdMob, AdSense, Search Console, GitHub, and other services into a single workspace, helping users monitor downloads, revenue, traffic, performance, and operational health from one dashboard.
The product is currently in active development by [BarkinMad Studios](/about), with a public beta planned before wider release.

sections.heading: Why It Was Built
paragraphs: Developers often need to switch between multiple services and dashboards to understand how their products and business are performing. This creates fragmented workflows and makes it difficult to identify trends and issues quickly.

StudioDash provides a unified dashboard experience, consolidating analytics, revenue reporting, service health, and operational metrics into a single native application designed specifically for independent developers.

sections.heading: Development Status
paragraphs: StudioDash is actively developed by BarkinMad Studios.
Development is actively in progress, with Cloudflare and App Store Connect integrations already operational and additional services being added as the platform evolves.
